violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Taco meat, prepared more than 24 hours ago, in the walk-in cooler was found not dated. Potentially hazardous foods should be date marked to make sure it is disposed of properly.

Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. Kitchen hand washing sink was not operational. Hand washing sinks must be operational at all times.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. Hand washing sink was not provided with soap during inspections. Soap should be provided at all times.--Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. Hand washing sink was not provided with paper towels during inspections. Paper towels should be provided at all times.
Approved, safe, unadulterated, approved additives, proper receiving temperature (4 pts deducted)
